race.description: The Adviser Collective Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: STAND MY GROUND (12) returns from a lengthy break. Sound debut when fourth over 1500m here behind Lady Pankhurst last October. Fitted with the two solid trials and gets her chance. VALENTIAGO (10) is racing well and a win looks imminent. Bounced off his sound second at Goulburn, with a fighting fourth in a small field over this trip at Wyong. Has a fitness edge over the main chances from the good gate. MOORDYUP (11) blinkers go on fourth-up after she launched late from back in the field with a sound second over this track and trip. Drawn out and no surprise to see her finish over the top of them. SCOOP THE POOL (8) improving gelding who will appreciate the blinkers going on. Closed strongly on his return with a respectable second over 1400m at Scone. Looking for this trip and further and will be ridden for luck from the wide gate.
